body: I signed in but the History of Climate Policy course is no longer showing on my dashboard. Can you help me get back in?
Hi Juan, I'm sorry for the trouble. Your enrollment is still active. It looks like the course was filtered under Completed. Try clicking All Courses on the dashboard and let me know if it appears.
That was it, thank you. It shows up again under All Courses now.
The Module 4 lecture video just spins and never starts playing. Audio and other videos work fine on my iMac.
Thanks Juan. That specific video was re-encoded this week. Please do a hard refresh with Ctrl+Shift+R and try again. If it still stalls, let me know which browser you're on.
I'm on Safari. The refresh helped for a moment but it stalled again about two minutes in.
I finished the Module 3 quiz but when I came back my answers were gone and it shows as not started.
I'm sorry about that, Juan. The quiz only saves when you click Submit at the end. I've reset the attempt so you can retake it, and your progress will save once submitted.
Juan confirmed the retaken quiz saved correctly. Closing this out. Glad it's sorted.
I completed Module 2. How do I download the completion certificate for my records?
Congratulations, Juan. Go to the course page, open the Certificates tab, and select Download PDF next to Module 2. I've also emailed a copy to juan.hernandez@gmail.com.
Certificate delivered and confirmed received. Closing the request.
I can log in on my computer but the mobile app keeps saying my password is incorrect. It's the same one.
Hi Juan. The app was on an older build that rejected certain special characters. Please update it in the App Store to version 4.2, then sign in again. Let me know if it still refuses.
Juan updated the app and logged in successfully. Marking resolved.
When I download the transcript for the Module 1 lecture, the last few paragraphs are cut off.
Thank you for reporting this, Juan. The transcript file was truncated on our end. I've re-uploaded the full version, so please download it again.
Corrected transcript confirmed complete. Closing.
I enrolled in the climate policy course but never got a confirmation email. Am I actually signed up?
You are enrolled. The confirmation had landed in spam; I've resent it and whitelisted our domain. Closing this out.
